---
title: "References"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from cffconvert import Citation
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict

cff = Citation(cffstr=Path("CITATION.cff").read_text())._implementation.cffobj
refs = cff.get("references", [])

TYPE_LABELS = {
    "article": "Journal Articles",
    "conference-paper": "Conference Papers",
    "report": "Technical Reports",
    "software": "Software",
    "software-code": "Source Code",
    "manual": "Manuals & Documentation",
    "website": "Websites",
    "generic": "Standards & Miscellaneous",
}

TYPE_ORDER = list(TYPE_LABELS)


def fmt_authors(authors):
    parts = []
    for a in authors:
        if "family-names" in a:
            parts.append(f"{a['family-names']}, {a['given-names']}")
        else:
            parts.append(a.get("name", ""))
    if len(parts) <= 1:
        return parts[0] if parts else ""
    return "; ".join(parts[:-1]) + "; and " + parts[-1]


def fmt_ref(r):
    authors = fmt_authors(r.get("authors", []))
    year = r.get("year", "")
    title = r.get("title", "")
    venue = (
        r.get("journal")
        or (r.get("conference") or {}).get("name")
        or (r.get("institution") or {}).get("name")
        or (r.get("publisher") or {}).get("name")
        or ""
    )
    doi = r.get("doi", "")
    url = r.get("url", "")
    link = f"[doi:{doi}](https://doi.org/{doi})" if doi else (f"[{url}]({url})" if url else "")
    meta = " · ".join(p for p in [authors, str(year) if year else "", venue, link] if p)
    return f"- **{title}**  \n  {meta}" if meta else f"- **{title}**"


by_type = defaultdict(list)
for ref in refs:
    by_type[ref.get("type", "generic")].append(ref)

out = []
for t in TYPE_ORDER:
    group = by_type.get(t, [])
    if not group:
        continue
    out.append(f"\n## {TYPE_LABELS[t]}\n")
    out.extend(fmt_ref(r) for r in group)

# Emit any types not in TYPE_ORDER
for t, group in by_type.items():
    if t not in TYPE_ORDER:
        out.append(f"\n## {t}\n")
        out.extend(fmt_ref(r) for r in group)

print("\n".join(out))
```
